args.content:
# Hawaii Packing List

Based on the vacation itinerary for Hawaii (June 10-20, 2024):

## Essential Items
- Swimwear
- Sunscreen (reef-safe recommended)
- Beach towel
- Sunglasses
- Hat/cap for sun protection

## Clothing
- Casual outfits for daily wear
- Light jacket or sweater for cooler evenings
- Workout clothes for hiking
- Nice outfit for the luau
- Flip flops/sandals
- Hiking shoes

## Activities & Gear
- Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins)
- Camera or smartphone for photos
- Waterproof phone case
- Reusable water bottle
- Day backpack for excursions

## Documents & Essentials
- Travel documents (ID, passport if needed, flight tickets)
- Hotel reservation details
- Credit cards and cash
- Health insurance card
- Medications

## Personal Items
- Toiletries
- Hair care products
- Makeup
- Razor
- Feminine hygiene products

## Electronics
- Phone and charger
- Camera and charger
- Universal power adapter (if needed)
- Headphones

Have a wonderful trip to Hawaii!
